## Final checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and follows repository architecture.
- [ ] Tests cover changed behavior or the absence of tests is explained.
- [ ] Documentation and examples are updated.
- [ ] No credentials, local state, or generated build output are committed.
- [ ] Breaking changes and follow-up work are clearly recorded.
